note_date.description: Note date is required for clinical timeline integrity, HIPAA minimum necessary documentation, and regulatory retention scheduling; incorrect dates create medical-legal liability

provider_npi.description: Provider NPI links note to credentialed clinician record for quality reporting, attestation workflows, and FHIR Practitioner resource matching; format validation is critical

patient_mrn.description: MRN is the EMR patient master identifier; extraction errors cause wrong-patient note attribution — a patient safety event and HIPAA violation risk

patient_dob.description: Date of birth is a required patient identity verification field and is used for age-based clinical decision support; errors may cause mismatched records

assessment_diagnoses.description: Diagnoses drive billing code generation, quality measure attribution, and care gap identification; clinical notes often use informal terminology requiring ICD-10 inference — lower threshold reflects this complexity

objective_vitals.description: Vital signs are critical for clinical decision support (e.g., sepsis alerts, hypertension management) and population health analytics; structured extraction must preserve units and values accurately

chief_complaint.description: Chief complaint drives care pathway routing and patient communication; lower threshold acceptable as it is often free text in provider's words rather than a labeled field

provider_name.description: Provider name required for note attribution, medical staff credentialing verification, and peer review workflows; format variability (signature vs. header) reduces achievable confidence

note_type.description: Note type classification routes records to appropriate downstream workflows (discharge planning, consultation reply, admission H&P); misclassification is recoverable through human review

medications_mentioned.description: Medication extraction from free-text clinical notes is inherently approximate due to abbreviations, brand/generic mixing, and contextual usage; lower threshold reflects extraction complexity

follow_up_timeframe.description: Follow-up timeframe supports care gap and no-show tracking; acceptable at lower confidence as it is often embedded in narrative Plan text rather than a discrete field

document_id.description: Required field for Clinical Note SOAP extraction.
